How to use

Two simple ways to add SlimSip to your day.

Choose the routine that fits your lifestyle and use consistently.

Method 1: Warm Herbal Drink

1

Take 1.5 cups normal water.

2

Add 1 teaspoon SlimSip powder.

3

Boil until around 1 cup remains.

4

Drink warm on an empty stomach in the morning. Repeat at bedtime.

Method 2: Quick Daily Mix

1

Take 1 teaspoon SlimSip powder.

2

Mix or take with 1 glass normal water.

3

Use in the morning and at bedtime.

4

Stay consistent with balanced meals and light daily activity.

Important Safety

  • Not suitable for pregnant women.
  • Not suitable for breastfeeding women.
  • Not suitable for children.
  • Anyone with allergies, medical conditions or regular medicine should consult a doctor before use.

No. SlimSip is a herbal food-based product, not a medicine. It is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.

No. SlimSip supports a weight-management routine. Results may vary from person to person depending on diet, activity, sleep, body type and consistency.

You can use it in the morning and at bedtime as part of your wellness routine.
